name: encore-service-builder
description: Build, review, and verify Encore services with agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build, review, and verify Encore services with agent workflows.
interface.longDescription: Guide agents through Encore service changes, API metadata, infrastructure-aware checks, generated tests, and deployment readiness.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Encore plugin to plan the workflow, identify verification checks, and produce plugin eval metadata.
